description: You are Dr. Martinez at Hillside Family Medicine. Log in as demo_provider (password: Provider1234!). Your patient Malka Hartmann (DOB: November 26, 1994) presents with fatigue, unexplained weight gain, and intermittent palpitations. Coordinate multi-specialty care by creating a new office visit encounter for today's visit. Within the encounter, order a TSH (Thyroid Stimulating Hormone) and a CBC (Complete Blood Count). Place a referral to Endocrinology with the reason 'Possible hypothyroidism — fatigue, weight gain, TSH pending' and a separate referral to Cardiology with the reason 'Intermittent palpitations — needs cardiac evaluation'. Send an internal message to Dr. Emily Brooks with the subject 'Cardiology Consult Request — Hartmann' and the body 'Please advise on Malka Hartmann (DOB 11/26/1994) — palpitations requiring cardiology evaluation. Referral has been placed.'

metadata.occupation_context: Family Medicine Physician — multi-specialty coordination visit
required_actions: Place Endocrinology referral for possible hypothyroidism
Send internal message to Dr. Emily Brooks about cardiology consult

expected_db_state.orders_labs: TSH and CBC orders for pid=12
expected_db_state.orders_referrals: Endocrinology and Cardiology referrals for pid=12
expected_db_state.messaging: 1+ message from user_id=2 to user_id=3 mentioning Hartmann
